calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Ashwin Ladva, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Michael Williams.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) San Francisco Community Service Center, Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Michael Williams sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
The following exhibits were marked by the court and admitted in evidence.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1. Paychek Id/Evid.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2. Time-sheet Instituto Laboral de la Raza. Id/Evid.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 3. Spread Sheet Id/Evid.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $10,870.20
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $5,200.19
Costs: $438.25
Total Judgment in the amount of $16,508.45
Court ordered exhibits returned to counsel for the care and custody of the court.
Judgment signed in open court.
